docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $157.00 FILED BY HUANG, VINCENT AS TO DEFENDANT SPRANGLER, LAYNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 20.00 - SERVED SEP-09-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SPRANGLER, LAYNE
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $847.45 FILED BY SPRANGLER, LAYNE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HUANG, VINCENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED SEP-17-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HUANG, VINCENT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT LAYN STATED IN COURT THAT HER NAME CORRECT IS LAYNE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT LAYN STATED IN COURT THAT HER CORRECT NAME IS LAYNE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, VINCENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPRANGLER, LAYNE $157.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $187.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SPRANGLER, LAYNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HUANG, VINCENT DEFENDANT'S CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE--WRONG PARTY SUED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SPRANGLER, LAYNE
